opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I was out for a run and my heart suddenly started racing like crazy, then everything went dark for a second and I had to sit down before I passed out. My parents are here with me, we're pretty freaked out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It only just happened, maybe half an hour ago, and we didn't know if we should just wait it out or get checked now.

symptom_narrative.onset: about half an hour ago, while jogging
symptom_narrative.duration: the racing and dizziness lasted around 15 minutes and then settled once I sat down and rested
symptom_narrative.character: heart pounding really fast and hard, and my vision went dark like I was about to faint
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: pretty scary, felt like I was going to pass out but didn't quite
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my chest, could feel it racing, and a woozy feeling in my head
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on suddenly during the run, not something that's constant
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting down and resting made it settle after about 15 minutes
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: not sure, it just came on while I was running
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel pretty wiped out and anxious now, but no chest pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've noticed my heart racing a bit during hard runs over the last couple of months, but nothing like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm scared to go back out running or do any exercise right now

family_history_as_reported.narrative: my mum's brother died suddenly when he was about 30 — we were told his heart just stopped, nobody really explained why

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: occasional, a drink or two on weekends with friends
social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: very active, run most days and train for events
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: uni exams coming up but otherwise nothing unusual going on

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: scared this means he can never run or play sport again; wants to know if he can go back to training soon

communication_style.typical_message_style: writes in full sentences, sounds worried, sometimes seeks reassurance
